title: LLM Token Heatmap Trace
description: Canonical JSON payload for a single adaptive-probe generation trace. Produced by `llm_token_heatmap.generate_with_adaptive_probe` after lightweight serialization, and consumed by the CLI exporter and the web frontend viewer. One file == one prompt == one generation.

schema_version.description: Semver of this schema. Bump major on breaking changes; consumers must hard-fail on unknown major.

attention_metadata.description: Architecture metadata describing the attention captures referenced by per-step `attention` blocks. Present whenever any step carries an `attention` array; absent for traces produced without an AttentionProbe.

activation_metadata.description: Architecture and tokenizer metadata describing the activation captures referenced by per-step `activations` blocks. Present whenever any step carries an `activations` array; absent for traces produced without an ActivationProbe. Shape mirrors `docs/web/activation.schema.json#/$defs/ActivationMetadata` so the projected activation subset of this trace validates against the activation schema.

manifold.description: Optional manifold analysis of the captured activation clouds — PCA spectrum, participation ratio, TwoNN intrinsic dimension, low-D projection, trajectory curvature, and periodicity — one entry per analyzed (layer, submodule). Produced post-hoc by `token-heatmap manifold` from a trace plus its activation sidecars; absent otherwise. Inspired by transformer-circuits.pub/2025/linebreaks.

model_architecture.description: Self-contained structural summary of the model read straight from `model.config` (+ a parameter count) at trace time, so the web Model tab can render an architecture overview without any capture flags. Every field is best-effort/optional; absent only on producers that predate it.

neuron_attribution.description: Trace-level TWERA-style neuron ranking: per captured (layer, submodule), the residual-stream neurons ranked by their expected residual-direct attribution to the realized next token (mean over steps of activation_i * unembedding[target_token, i]). A single-trace approximation of Target-Weighted Expected Residual Attribution (transformer-circuits.pub/2025/attribution-graphs). Present only when the producer captured full activations (`--capture-full-activations`).

direct_logit_attribution.description: Per-step Direct Logit Attribution: the realized next-token logit decomposed into additive contributions from the residual input (embed) and each layer's attention-block (o_proj) and MLP-block (mlp_out) outputs, projected through the unembedding with the final norm folded as a fixed scale (transformer-circuits.pub/2025/attribution-graphs). A per-step `error` reports the unexplained residual. Present only when the producer captured full activations (`--capture-full-activations`).

metadata.description: Per-trace metadata: model identity, sampling parameters, and prompt.

model.description: HuggingFace model id or local path used for generation.

prompt.description: The user prompt before any chat-template wrapping.

system_prompt.description: Optional system message used when use_chat_template=true.

use_chat_template.description: Whether tokenizer.apply_chat_template was applied to the prompt.

generated_text.description: Full decoded text including the prompt, with special tokens skipped.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the trace finished generating.

dtype.description: PyTorch dtype used for the forward pass.

vocab_size.description: Tokenizer vocabulary size; used by the UI to compute rank as a percentile if requested.

eps.description: Numerical stability constant used inside the probe.

tokens.description: Prompt tokens, surfaced separately so the UI can render the prompt with the same hover affordances as generated tokens. These are the tokens fed into the model before step 0 (after chat-template wrapping, if any).

prompt_tokens.description: Decoded prompt tokens; same length as prompt_token_ids.

steps.description: Per-generation-step records. `steps[i].step` MUST equal `i`. Iteration ends early on EOS, so length <= generation_params.max_new_tokens.

Manifold.description: Manifold analysis results, one entry per analyzed (layer, submodule) activation cloud. See `llm_token_heatmap/manifold.py`.

schema_version.description: Semver of the manifold payload shape.

method.description: Dimensionality-reduction method used for the projection.

layers.description: One manifold-analysis entry per analyzed (layer, submodule) cloud.

ManifoldScalar.description: The per-position task scalar a supervised probe was fit against (present when `manifold --probe` was used). Lets the web app colour the manifold by the scalar instead of by generation step.

name.description: Scalar name, e.g. `line_position` (characters since the last newline).

values.description: Scalar value at each position, aligned with `positions`.

n_positions.description: Number of token positions (rows) in the analyzed cloud.

positions.description: Generation-step index for each row, aligned with `projection.coords`.

ManifoldProbe.description: Supervised linear-probe result for this cloud: how well the manifold's task scalar is linearly decodable from the activations. See `llm_token_heatmap/probe.py`.

r2_cv.description: Cross-validated R² of the scalar decode; null when too few positions to cross-validate.

r2_full.description: In-sample R² of the full-data fit; null when the probe could not be fit.

n_components.description: PCA rank the cloud was reduced to before regressing.

cv_folds.description: Number of CV folds used (0 when CV was skipped).

ManifoldProbeCircular.description: Helix test: how decodable the *circular* coordinate cos/sin(2π·scalar/period) of the scalar is, at the best-fitting period. High circular r2_cv together with a high linear probe r2_cv is the helix signature (a plain linear ramp gives near-zero circular r2_cv).

best_period.description: Period (in scalar units) whose circular coordinate is most decodable; null when the scalar range is too small to resolve one.

r2_cv.description: Cross-validated R² of decoding the circular coordinate at `best_period` (averaged over cos and sin).

r2_full.description: In-sample R² of the circular decode at `best_period`.

twonn.description: TwoNN intrinsic-dimension estimate; null when not estimable.

coords.description: Per-position PCA scores; row i is the projection of position i. Shape (n_positions, n_components).

mean.description: Mean interior discrete curvature; null when undefined.

per_position.description: Per-position curvature; endpoints and degenerate points are null.

dominant_period.description: Period (in positions) of the dominant non-DC FFT component of PC1; null when none.

power.description: Normalized spectral power of the dominant component (peak / total).

step.description: Zero-indexed position in the generation loop.

selected.description: The token actually appended to the generation at this step. Shared between raw and processed sources.

raw.description: Adaptive probe applied to the raw temperature-scaled logits (pre top-p / top-k).

processed.description: Adaptive probe applied to the post-sampling-filter logits (after top-p / top-k / repetition penalty).

logit_lens.description: Optional per-layer logit-lens projections for this step. Present when a LogitLens probe was attached during generation. Ordered by layer_idx ascending.

attention.description: Tier 1 inline attention summary, one entry per captured decoder layer. Absent for traces produced without an AttentionProbe.

attention_sidecar_ref.description: URI pointer to a Tier 2 sidecar payload (full attention distribution and/or raw Q/K/V tensors) for this step, or null when no sidecar was written. Sidecar files follow `docs/web/attention-sidecar.schema.json`.

activation_sidecar_ref.description: URI pointer to a Tier 2 activation sidecar payload (full per-(layer, submodule) hidden-state tensors) for this step, written when generated with `--capture-full-activations`. Null or absent when no activation sidecar was written.

token_id.description: Selected token id at this step. Mirrors `selected.token_id`; carried here so the projected activation subset of this trace matches `activation.schema.json#/$defs/ActivationStep`.

decoded_text_offset.description: Character offset of this step's decoded token in the concatenated decoded text. Drives cross-tokenizer alignment when two traces are compared by `compare_activations`.

activations.description: Per (layer, submodule) activation summary entries captured by an attached ActivationProbe. Ordering is layer-major then submodule-major following `activation_metadata.captured_submodules`. Absent for traces produced without an ActivationProbe.

ModelArchitecture.description: Self-contained structural summary of the traced model, read from `model.config` plus a parameter count. All fields optional/best-effort so partial configs and exotic architectures still validate.

num_key_value_heads.description: Key/value heads per layer (smaller than `num_attention_heads` under Grouped Query Attention).

head_dim.description: Per-head dimension; derived from hidden_size / heads when the config omits it.

vocab_size.description: Vocabulary size of the embedding / unembedding.

max_position_embeddings.description: Maximum context length the position encoding supports.

tie_word_embeddings.description: Whether the input embedding and output unembedding weights are tied.

num_parameters.description: Total trainable+frozen parameter count summed over `model.parameters()`.

dtype.description: Parameter / compute dtype at trace time.

NeuronAttribution.description: Trace-level TWERA-style neuron attribution. A single-trace approximation of Target-Weighted Expected Residual Attribution (transformer-circuits.pub/2025/attribution-graphs/methods.html): residual-direct path, final LayerNorm omitted.

n_steps.description: Number of generation steps the expectation was averaged over.

note.description: Human-readable description of the score and its caveats.

layers.description: One ranked-neuron list per captured (layer, submodule).

submodule.description: Captured submodule whose residual-basis output was scored (e.g. resid_post, mlp_out, o_proj).

neurons.description: Top neurons by descending TWERA score.

index.description: Zero-indexed neuron position within the hidden dimension.

twera.description: Mean over steps of activation_i * unembedding[target_token, i] — the neuron's expected residual-direct attribution to the realized next token.

mean_activation.description: Mean activation of the neuron across the scored steps (the on-distribution 'how active' component).

DirectLogitAttribution.description: Per-step direct logit attribution of the realized next token, folding the final norm as a fixed scale.

num_layers.description: Number of decoder layers contributing per step.

note.description: Human-readable description of the decomposition and its caveats.

step.description: Zero-indexed generation step this decomposition belongs to.

target_token_id.description: Vocabulary id of the realized next token being attributed.

total_logit.description: The model's logit for the target token (norm(h_final) · W_U[target]).

embed.description: Contribution of the residual input (token embedding plus any residual not attributed to a captured block).

bias.description: Contribution of the final-norm bias term (0 for RMSNorm models).

error.description: Unexplained residual: total_logit minus the summed contributions (final-norm linearization gap; ~0 for RMSNorm models).

layers.description: Per-layer attention-block and MLP-block contributions to the target logit.

attn.description: Direct contribution of this layer's attention block (o_proj output) to the target logit.

mlp.description: Direct contribution of this layer's MLP block (mlp_out output) to the target logit.

heads.description: Optional per-attention-head split of this layer's `attn` contribution (sums to `attn`). Present only when full activations captured the o_proj input. See DirectLogitAttributionHead.

head.description: Zero-indexed attention head within the layer.

attn.description: Direct contribution of this head (W_O[:,head] @ z_head) to the target logit.

ActivationMetadata.description: Per-trace metadata describing the ActivationProbe captures. Mirrors `activation.schema.json#/$defs/ActivationMetadata`.

captured_submodules.description: Submodule names captured by the probe, in the order their per-(layer, submodule) entries appear inside each step's `activations` array.

num_layers.description: Total number of decoder layers in the model.

tokenizer_fingerprint.description: Stable identifier for the tokenizer that produced this trace's token ids.

captured_layers.description: Zero-indexed decoder layer indices that the probe captured (ascending; duplicate-free).

ActivationLayerEntry.description: Summary statistics for one (step, layer, submodule) activation tensor. Mirrors `activation.schema.json#/$defs/ActivationLayerEntry`.

AttentionMetadata.description: Per-trace metadata describing the AttentionProbe captures. Present whenever any step carries an `attention` array.

num_layers.description: Total number of decoder layers in the model (regardless of how many were captured).

num_attention_heads.description: Number of query attention heads per layer.

num_key_value_heads.description: Number of key/value heads per layer (equals num_attention_heads for MHA; smaller under Grouped Query Attention).

captured_layers.description: Zero-indexed decoder layer indices that the probe captured (ascending; duplicate-free).

AttentionLayerEntry.description: Tier 1 attention summary for a single (step, layer). The per-layer scalars here are the mean across heads.

layer.description: Zero-indexed decoder layer index; must appear in attention_metadata.captured_layers.

entropy.description: Mean Shannon entropy (nats) of the per-head attention distribution over previous positions, averaged across heads.

self_weight.description: Mean attention weight on the current (last) position, averaged across heads.

bos_weight.description: Mean attention weight on position 0 (typically the BOS / sink token), averaged across heads.

top_positions.description: Most-attended source positions for this layer, aggregated across heads, sorted by descending weight.

q_norm.description: Mean L2 norm of the current-token Q vector across heads.

k_norm.description: Mean L2 norm of the current-token K vector across heads.

v_norm.description: Mean L2 norm of the current-token V vector across heads.

qk_alignment_angle.description: Mean angle in degrees between the head's Q vector and the K vector of its top-attended source position, averaged across heads.

per_head.description: Optional per-head Tier 1 scalars, one entry per attention head (length = attention_metadata.num_attention_heads), ordered by head index. Lets the Layer x Head grid color each head distinctly; absent on older traces, where the grid broadcasts the layer mean across all heads.

entropy.description: This head's attention entropy in nats.

self_weight.description: This head's attention weight on the current (self) position.

bos_weight.description: This head's attention weight on the BOS position.

top1_weight.description: This head's single largest source-position attention weight.

q_norm.description: L2 norm of this head's current-token Q vector.

k_norm.description: L2 norm of this head's current-token K vector.

v_norm.description: L2 norm of this head's current-token V vector.

induction.description: Induction score: attention this head places on the token following the current token's most recent earlier occurrence (the induction-head signature). Optional; 0 when the current token is novel.

position.description: Zero-indexed source position in the key sequence.

weight.description: Aggregate attention weight on this position (mean across heads).

token.description: Decoded text of the selected token (special tokens NOT skipped).

Distribution.description: Outcome of one AdaptiveTokenProbe forward pass for one (step, source) pair.

k_used.description: Number of candidates kept by the adaptive rule (clamped to [min_k, max_k]).

entropy.description: Shannon entropy of the full next-token distribution, in nats.

top_mass_used.description: Cumulative probability mass covered by the kept candidates.

selected_logprob.description: log(selected_prob + eps); may be -inf-ish but always finite under the probe's eps clamp.

selected_rank.description: 1-indexed rank of the selected token across the FULL vocabulary.

candidates.description: Kept candidates, length == k_used, sorted by descending prob.

LogitLensLayer.description: Logit-lens projection of one decoder layer's residual stream for one generation step.

top_k.description: Highest-probability candidates after projecting this layer's hidden state through (optionally) the final LayerNorm and the lm_head.

entropy.description: Shannon entropy (nats) of this layer's full next-token distribution.

selected_token_rank.description: 1-indexed rank of the step's selected token within this layer's distribution.

selected_token_prob.description: Probability assigned to the step's selected token by this layer's distribution.
